original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Lucas, Jacob, Alexander, and Emma. Lucas told you that Alexander is a knight or Lucas is a knight. According to Jacob, "Emma is not a knight". Alexander noted, "Emma is a knave and Lucas is a knight". Emma was heard saying, "Alexander is a knight and Lucas is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
